transcription.text: The best tasting frostings are homemade with Imperial 10X powdered sugar. Be sure you get Imperial. Of all fabrics, silk has the finest texture. As you know, silk is smooth and tightly woven. Here fastened to a frame, you see the same fine silk as in the dress I wear. Only here, silk will demonstrate the most important quality of Imperial 10X powdered sugar. We call it the Imperial Silk Test. It shows that Imperial 10X is today's finest powdered sugar. You can see how extra fine it is. So fine it sifts right through silk. The Imperial Silk Test proves that Imperial 10X is today's finest powdered sugar. Finest for frostings. Imperial 10X powdered sugar blends quickly with other ingredients. Gives you creamy, smooth as velvet frostings. High, fluffy frostings. The best tasting frostings for your fine cakes. Be sure you get Imperial. Imperial 10X Powdered Sugar

You can see how extra fine it is.
So fine it sifts right through silk.
The Imperial Silk Test proves that Imperial 10X is today's finest powdered sugar.
Imperial 10X powdered sugar blends quickly with other ingredients.
